details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest highly-rated blog theme with one-click demo import to cart
Task 2: Choose higher-selling theme under $59 and add to wishlist
Task 3: Buy Elementor agency theme with WooCommerce support using AGENCY20 coupon
Task 4: Add recent affordable themes under $50 to comparison
Task 5: Add fast blog theme and newsletter-ready blog theme with different license durations to cart
Task 6: Get highest-rated Gutenberg-compatible theme and add to cart
Task 7: Add best-selling theme after viewing live demo to wishlist
Task 8: Open installation documentation for higher-priced WooCommerce theme
Task 9: Switch currency to EUR and add theme with Business support plan (3 licenses) to cart
